items.raw_desc: Hulahopp HMS HHM16 Súlyozott hulahopp karika mágnesekkel és számlálóval:The HMS HHM16 Massage Hula Hoop is an ideal addition to any home gym. Exercising with the hoop will help to slim the abdomen and waist and also reduce the tissues of the thighs and buttocks. The structure is composed of 16 parts, but at least 10 parts are needed to close the hoop. The individual parts conceal a rail into which an anchor fitted with 4 ball bearing castors is inserted before closing.
